case_title: C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR VS. PEIDONG YU

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT YU, PEIDONG NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION FOR AND RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR SERVED DEC-20-2024, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT YU, PEIDONG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLENE HASTINGS--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU, PEIDONG $3,115.70 PRINCIPAL, $1,540.35 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,656.05

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT YU, PEIDONG
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,540.35 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT YU, PEIDONG
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,045.20 FILED BY C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT YU, PEIDONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU, PEIDONG $3,045.20 PRINCIPAL, $70.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,115.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
